name: grafana
description: An MCP server giving access to Grafana dashboards, data and more.

tools.name: list_teams
tools.description: List all teams

tools.name: list_users_by_org
tools.description: List all users in an organization

tools.name: search_dashboards
tools.description: Search for dashboards

tools.name: get_dashboard_by_uid
tools.description: Get a dashboard by uid

tools.name: update_dashboard
tools.description: Update or create a new dashboard

tools.name: get_dashboard_panel_queries
tools.description: Get panel title, queries, datasource UID and type from a dashboard

tools.name: get_dashboard_property
tools.description: Extract specific parts of a dashboard using JSONPath expressions

tools.name: get_dashboard_summary
tools.description: Get a compact summary of a dashboard without full JSON

tools.name: list_datasources
tools.description: List datasources

tools.name: get_datasource_by_uid
tools.description: Get a datasource by uid

tools.name: get_datasource_by_name
tools.description: Get a datasource by name

tools.name: query_prometheus
tools.description: Execute a query against a Prometheus datasource

tools.name: list_prometheus_metric_metadata
tools.description: List metric metadata

tools.name: list_prometheus_metric_names
tools.description: List available metric names

tools.name: list_prometheus_label_names
tools.description: List label names matching a selector

tools.name: list_prometheus_label_values
tools.description: List values for a specific label

tools.name: list_incidents
tools.description: List incidents in Grafana Incident

tools.name: create_incident
tools.description: Create an incident in Grafana Incident

tools.name: add_activity_to_incident
tools.description: Add an activity item to an incident in Grafana Incident

tools.name: get_incident
tools.description: Get a single incident by ID

tools.name: query_loki_logs
tools.description: Query and retrieve logs using LogQL (either log or metric queries)

tools.name: list_loki_label_names
tools.description: List all available label names in logs

tools.name: list_loki_label_values
tools.description: List values for a specific log label

tools.name: query_loki_stats
tools.description: Get statistics about log streams

tools.name: list_alert_rules
tools.description: List alert rules

tools.name: get_alert_rule_by_uid
tools.description: Get alert rule by UID

tools.name: list_contact_points
tools.description: List notification contact points

tools.name: list_oncall_schedules
tools.description: List schedules from Grafana OnCall

tools.name: get_oncall_shift
tools.description: Get details for a specific OnCall shift

tools.name: get_current_oncall_users
tools.description: Get users currently on-call for a specific schedule

tools.name: list_oncall_teams
tools.description: List teams from Grafana OnCall

tools.name: list_oncall_users
tools.description: List users from Grafana OnCall

tools.name: get_sift_investigation
tools.description: Retrieve an existing Sift investigation by its UUID

tools.name: get_sift_analysis
tools.description: Retrieve a specific analysis from a Sift investigation

tools.name: list_sift_investigations
tools.description: Retrieve a list of Sift investigations with an optional limit

tools.name: find_error_pattern_logs
tools.description: Finds elevated error patterns in Loki logs.

tools.name: find_slow_requests
tools.description: Finds slow requests from the relevant tempo datasources.

tools.name: list_pyroscope_label_names
tools.description: List label names matching a selector

tools.name: list_pyroscope_label_values
tools.description: List label values matching a selector for a label name

tools.name: list_pyroscope_profile_types
tools.description: List available profile types

tools.name: fetch_pyroscope_profile
tools.description: Fetches a profile in DOT format for analysis

tools.name: get_assertions
tools.description: Get assertion summary for a given entity

tools.name: generate_deeplink
tools.description: Generate accurate deeplink URLs for Grafana resources

grafana_service_account_token.title: Grafana service account token
grafana_service_account_token.description: Service account token used to authenticate with your Grafana instance

grafana_username.title: Grafana username
grafana_username.description: Username to authenticate with your Grafana instance

grafana_password.title: Grafana password
grafana_password.description: Password to authenticate with your Grafana instance
